title: mesosphaerum angulosum
intro: Mesosphaerum angulosum, also known as Lemon Balm, is a perennial plant in the mint family, native to the United States and parts of Canada. Its leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum angulosum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues, such as nausea and bloating. Herbal preparations of Mesosphaerum angulosum include teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, calmness, and overall well-being.
